title: sourcing map Silk Artificial Hydrangea Flowers, Light Pink Artificial Flowers Heads with Stems, Full Hydrangea Flowers for Wedding Centerpieces, Party Decoration 30Set
features: The silk artificial flowers are made of silk cloth and plastic, which are realistic in appearance, durable, and reusable, not easy to fade, and suitable for weddings, birthday parties, Christmas, or home decorations, to create a romantic and warm.
Flower Head Diameter: 16cm/6 inch(approx.); Stem Length: 15cm/5.9 inch(approx.); Color: Light Pink.
The full hydrangea flowers are in rich color, in the shape of hydrangeas, beautiful and romantic, suitable for table, shelf, desk, and vase decoration, which can catch people's attention quickly.
Just insert the stem into the hole, which is the back of the hydrangea flower head, then you can bundle these flowers together to get a lush look.
Flowers and stems are separated and you can install them by yourself. All size is measured manually, please allow +/-1 inches error.
description: Product description What is this? The silk artificial flowers are made of silk cloth and plastic, which are realistic in appearance, durable, and reusable, not easy to fade, and suitable for weddings, birthday parties, Christmas, or home decorations, to create a romantic and warm. What will I get? The hydrangea flower, in size of: Flower Head Diameter: 16cm /6 inch(approx.); Stem Length: 15cm / 5.9 inch(approx.); Color: Light Pink In the package of 30 set x silk artificial flower Are there any advantages of the product? The full hydrangea flowers are in rich color, in the shape of hydrangeas, beautiful and romantic, suitable for table, shelf, desk, and vase decoration, which can catch people's attention quickly. How to use it? Just insert the stem into the hole, which is the back of the hydrangea flower head, then you can bundle these flowers together to get a lush look. What should I notice? Flowers and stems are separated and you can install them by yourself. All size is measured manually, please allow +/-1 inches error. Safety Warning This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets.
